title: NEIGRIHMS Executive Engineer Recruitment 2026 - Apply Offline
organization: North Eastern Indira Gandhi Regional Institute of Health and Medical Sciences Shillong (NEIGRIHMS)
short_info: North Eastern Indira Gandhi Regional Institute of Health and Medical Sciences Shillong (NEIGRIHMS) Executive Engineer Notification 2026 has been released on the official website of NEIGRIHMS. A total of 1 vacancy has been announced through the NEIGRIHMS Executive Engineer Recruitment 2026.

age_limit.details: Maximum Age Limit: 56 years. Age relaxation will be as per the rules of the Government of India for deputation posts.

qualification.education_qualification: Bachelor Degree in Civil Engineering from a recognized University
qualification.details: Executive Engineer (Civil): Bachelor Degree in Civil Engineering from a recognized University or institute with 07 years' practical experience in planning, designing, and construction work.

salary_details.details: The selected candidate will be placed at Level 11 of the Pay Matrix.

how_to_apply: Candidates who wish to apply for NEIGRIHMS Executive Engineer Recruitment 2026 through offline mode should follow the steps below.
Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Download the application form from the official website: .
Fill the application form carefully with correct information.
